text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from a day out, Super Creek
and I are talking about getting tea together
when...

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Spending a lazy day with your Umamusume? Talk
about taking it easy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um... And you are?

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text: I'm a trainer at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, is that so? Then that must make the
two of you acquai—

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
That's neither here nor there. Shouldn't you be
taking better care of your Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
These first three years of the Twinkle Series are
the most important to an Umamusume, right?

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure you don't have the time to be
slacking off like this.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text: The girls may need breaks, but do trainers?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Of course they do. A trainer would collapse if
they worked non-stop. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
My trainer is very considerate of me. You don't
need to worry about us.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
That kind of complacent mindset leaves no room
for an Umamusume to grow.
choice_data_list: I have clear and detailed plans.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right—because you're an amazing
person.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're always studying so much so you can do
well to guide me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're a wonderful trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...I see. It's none of my business, I suppose. If
you'll excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The other trainer storms off in a huff.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Hey. Don't let what that other trainer said get
to you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: We're moving along at our own pace. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she had something troubling her. She
sounded... really lonely.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't give it much thought.
choice_data_list: It's okay. It doesn't bother me.
It's okay. It doesn't bother me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Glad to hear that. Okay, let's relax with a cup of
tea before heading back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Super Creek spends the rest of the
day walking right by my side as if to comfort me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: My trainer knows me better than I know myself.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And all that knowledge and experience helps me
one way or another.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So while I appreciate the concern, there's really
nothing for you to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Well, if the day ever comes that you
regret those words, don't come crying to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The other trainer storms off in a huff.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Are you thinking about what that other
trainer said to you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I thought so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Instead of thinking about what she said, I hope
you can take my words to heart.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're always helping me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, when I'm supposed to be spoiling
you, I feel like I'm the one who ends up being
spoiled.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So you should believe in yourself. Okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Super Creek spends the rest of the
day walking right by my side as if to comfort me.
